axiom: axiom (forall s: Seq :: { Seq#Length(s) } Seq#Take(s, Seq#Length(s)) == s);
alone_result: 15 verified, 4 errors (doesn't fix loop invariants; pre-existing errors also remain)
notes: Take-of-full-length axiom alone doesn't fix the loop invariant issue (needs Take-of-Take for that). But when combined, both axioms together fix all 18 VCs. The broad {Seq#Length(s)} trigger helps the SeqMinIsMin/SeqMaxIsMax lemmas verify at Boogie level.
